doc: Application root model. Intended runtime composition root; current target may attach TreeEditor through a thin host bootstrap adapter until AppNode is materialized. Semantic data is initialized through the declared data/asset branch, not passed into TreeEditor runtime entrypoints.

children.doc: Root node of the executable tree editor branch. Attaches the editor to a host boundary, owns the toolbar, mode holder, and pane, and exposes resolved editor state and data through explicit contracts.
Horizontal toolbar area. Immutable container for EditToggleBtn.

Switchable holder for the mode toggle action. Owns the active visual sub-state, switches between EditToggleBtnViewModeState and EditToggleBtnEditModeState based on editor mode, and reads isEditMode from ancestor TreeEditor on refresh().
Default visual state of EditToggleBtn. Owns the edit-action structure, resolves its final action label, and forwards semantic toggle requests to TreeEditor.
Edit visual state of EditToggleBtn. Owns the view-action structure, resolves its final action label, and forwards semantic toggle requests to TreeEditor.
Displays controller-resolved build information text. Informational leaf node, no interaction.
Switchable state holder owning the editor mode state. Children: _viewModeState (default), _editModeState.
State node for view mode. onOpen(): updates controller-owned mode state and requests refresh; presentation content later pulls resolved values.
State node for edit mode. onOpen(): updates controller-owned mode state and requests refresh; presentation content later pulls resolved values.
Main content area of the editor. Immutable container holding RootItemHolder.
Container holding the single root TreeItem instance. It pulls the root record through EditorPane context and attaches TreeItem to context only.
Runtime root item attached to RootItemHolder context. The root record is pulled through the parent contract.
Project library branch. Contains reusable node templates referenced from executable branches.
Library namespace for editor pane nodes. Detailed branch is stored in top/libraries/pane.library.json.
Project asset catalog. Describes project-local source assets stored under top/assets.
Demo source tree data initialized through the data/asset branch or bootstrap adapter. It is not passed as a semantic packet into TreeEditor.
Presentation branch. Owns platform-neutral theme/style source model; target may compile it into presentation artifacts or materialize it as runtime nodes when needed.
Switchable holder for active presentation theme. Owns theme state and exposes the active theme model.
Light theme state derived from presentation source artifacts.
Dark theme state derived from presentation source artifacts.
Presentation provider for TreeEditor nodes. Interprets source presentation rules and exposes platform-neutral style roles plus target-specific materialization helpers.
